title: RUIKASI Fleece Throw Blanket for Sofa - Double Fluffy Beige Throws for Sofas Large, Soft Warm Blanket Throw for Couch, Luxury Decorative Ribbed Bed Blanket 150x200cm Twin
features: Indulgent Comfort: Wrap yourself in the unparalleled softness and luxury of our 300gsm fleece sofa throws large 3 seater blanket. Despite its lightweight design, it offers delightful warmth, cocooning you in a plush embrace without feeling heavy, perfect for year-round use.

Chic Elegance: The 3D ribbed design gives the soft large settee throws 3 seater blanket a fascinating, three-dimensional striped look. Its natural color effortlessly adds sophistication to any room, complementing diverse décor styles with ease. Practical and elegant, the lovely blanket is an ideal gift for any occasions like birthdays, Mother's Day, Christmas ect.

Endless Versatility: Available in sizes ranging from single to king, our beige fluffy blanket offers limitless possibilities, whether as a decorative couch throw, sofa blanket, bedspread, or extra layer on your bedding.

Unwavering Quality: Every stitch embodies our commitment to quality, with neatly overlocked edges ensuring durability that withstands daily wear and tear. Plus, the blanket for bed double is OEKO-certified, guaranteeing it's free from harmful substances.

Effortless Maintenance: The fleece fabric is not only durable and fade-resistant but also maintains its softness wash after wash, what makes the bed blanket easy to maintenance—simply machine wash on a gentle cycle and tumble dry low—it promises long-term use without compromising on comfort or style.
